meta.source: RCL v2.223 compilation with 3+ source agreement
meta.note: Expanded to 17 ships with Voyager complete + 2 Radiance class from Grok v2.223 | Consolidated MDR variations | Added entertainment, activity, and bar venues previously classified as unknown | 2026-04-10: MSC Armonia venues verified against MSC official deck plan PDF. | 2026-04-10: MSC Bellissima venues verified against MSC official ship map PDF. | 2026-04-11: MSC Divina venues re-verified against MSC official ship map PDF; removed mashed calumet-manitoba-buffet slug + hallucinated kaito/ocean-cay from Divina; added the real Villa Rossa, The Black Crab, Manitou Buffet, Calumet Buffet, La Cantina di Bacco, Pantheon Theatre etc. | 2026-04-11: MSC Euribia class corrected World Class -> Meraviglia-Plus; added 45 verified venues from MSC official ship map PDF; removed hallucinated Butcher's Cut, Cirque du Soleil, Luna Park claims. | 2026-04-11: MSC Fantasia venues verified against MSC official ship map PDF; removed hallucinated kaito-sushi-bar and main-dining-room placeholder; added 33 verified venues including MDRs (Red Velvet, Il Cerchio d'Oro), L'Africana Buffet, L'Etoile (YC exclusive), Teatro L'Avanguardia, Piazza San Giorgio atrium. | 2026-04-11: MSC Grandiosa class standardized to Meraviglia-Plus Class; removed generic main-dining-room placeholder and hola-tacos-cantina (Grandiosa uses original Tapas Bar branding); added 37 verified venues including 4 MDRs, Cirque du Soleil Carousel Lounge, Himalayan Bridge, Galleria Grandiosa, and full Yacht Club enclave. | 2026-04-11: MSC Lirica verified against MSC UK deck plan PDF; fixed le-bistrot (was labeled specialty French, actually primary buffet); fixed la-bussola description (was alternative, actually primary MDR); removed main-dining-room placeholder; added 20 new Lirica venues including Broadway Theatre, La Pergola buffet family, Doremi Spray Park. | 2026-04-11: MSC Magnifica verified against post-refit MSC official ship map PDF (ma_en-gb.pdf); fixed IMO TBD -> 9387085; removed hallucinated oriental-plaza (not in PDF); added Yacht Club venues from Oct-Dec 2025 Palumbo Malta refit; expanded from 4 to 24 venues. | 2026-04-11: MSC Meraviglia verified; removed main-dining-room placeholder; added 4 real MDRs (Waves, L'Olive Doree, L'Olivo d'Oro, Panorama); reclassified ocean-cay as dining/specialty (real Deck 6 seafood restaurant on Meraviglia, distinct from the private island port); added 28 new Meraviglia-specific venues from beyondcruise + MSC Press Area + CruiseMapper. | 2026-04-11: MSC Musica verified against MSC official ship map PDF; fixed gli-archi-buffet name to 'Gli Archi & Il Giardino Buffet'; removed main-dining-room placeholder; added 22 new Musica venues including 2 real MDRs (L'Oleandro + Belle Époque), Teatro La Scala, Bar della Cascata atrium waterfall bar. | 2026-04-11: MSC Opera verified against MSC official UK deck plan PDF; removed main-dining-room placeholder; la-caravella and lapprodo descriptions refined; added 19 new Opera venues including Teatro dell'Opera, Doremy Spray Park, and the Lirica-class public rooms. | 2026-04-11: MSC Orchestra verified; deleted shanghai-chinese-restaurant hallucination (rebranded to Asian Restaurant per current PDF); removed main-dining-room, kaito-sushi-bar (not on Orchestra), and villa-verde-buffet (on Splendida not Orchestra) from Orchestra's list; added 23 new verified Orchestra venues including 2 MDRs, 2 buffets, Covent Garden Theatre, R32 Disco.
